title: Motorised Chain Mechanism Hacksaw
description: Motor-driven hacksaw using roller chain + sprocket to transmit power to a crank-slider mechanism producing an 80 mm reciprocating hacksaw stroke at 80 strokes/min for cutting mild steel.
objective: Cut mild steel bar ≤ 30 mm diameter; 80 mm stroke; 80 strokes/min; automatic return spring; quick-return mechanism.
constraints: 750 W single-phase motor; #40 roller chain; HSS blade 300 mm; bench-mounted frame.
design_element_titles: DC Gear Motor with PWM Speed Control

element_usage_notes.Chain-Drive Motorised Hacksaw Reciprocat: #40 chain, 12T:48T sprocket (4:1 reduction), 40 mm crank pin radius → 80 mm stroke.
